text:
fastifyViteDecoration.scope.decorateReply(
  'html',
  await runtimeConfig.createHtmlFunction(indexHtml, fastifyViteDecoration.scope, runtimeConfig),
)

runtimeConfig.clientModule =
    viteConfig.fastify?.clientModule ??
    runtimeConfig.clientModule ??
    resolveClientModule(viteConfig.root)

export interface FastifyViteDecorationPriorToSetup {
  scope: FastifyInstance
  runtimeConfig: RuntimeConfig
  devServer?: ViteDevServer
  entries?: ClientEntries
  runners?: Record<string, ModuleRunner>
}

const clientResult =
    !runtimeConfig.spa &&
    (await runtimeConfig.prepareClient(
      fastifyViteDecoration.entries!,
      fastifyViteDecoration.scope,
      runtimeConfig,
    ))

const client: ClientModule | null = !runtimeConfig.spa
    ? await runtimeConfig.prepareClient(entries, fastifyViteDecoration.scope, runtimeConfig)
    : null

export type ApolloFastifyContextFunction<
	Context extends BaseContext,
	RawServer extends RawServerBase = RawServerDefault,
	RouteGeneric extends RouteGenericInterface = RouteGenericInterface,
> = ContextFunction<ApolloFastifyContextFunctionArgument<RawServer, RouteGeneric>, Context>;

module.exports = fp(fastifyMultipart, {
  fastify: '5.x',
  name: '@fastify/multipart'
})
module.exports.default = fastifyMultipart
module.exports.fastifyMultipart = fastifyMultipart
module.exports.ajvFilePlugin = ajvFilePlugin

Twitters.propTypes = {
  askTweets: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
  isFetching: PropTypes.bool.isRequired,
  tweets: PropTypes.array.isRequired,
  error: PropTypes.string,
  onNewTweet: PropTypes.func.isRequired
}
